chunks.text: ORDER SHEET THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI CP No.D-4750 of 2021 Date Order with signature of Judge(s) 1. For hearing of CMA No.19451/2021. 2. For hearing of main case. 23.08.2021 Mr. Jawaid Farooqui, advocate for the petitioner. Mr. Kafeel Ahmed Abbasi, Deputy Attorney General. ********** Mr. Shamshad Ahmed, advocate files Vakalatnama on behalf of the respondents No.2, 3 and 4, which is taken on record. Perhaps in view of the outstanding dues the respondents have asked the bank of the petitioner for release of the amount of pay order. Since they have already availed remedy of appeal therefore petitioner’s counsel submits that the pay orders already submitted may not be encahsed, to such extent interim order was passed. As per learned counsel for the respondents No.2, 3 and 4, the pending appeal be decided in 45 days and till then they will maintain status quo. Order accordingly. Accordingly, this petition is disposed of by directing the Commissioner (Appeals-I), SRB, Karachi, to decide the pending Appeal preferably within 45 days from the date hereof. The fate of the amount shall be subject to the outcome of the pending appeal of the petitioner. JUDGE JUDGE Khuhro/PA
